creator: michaelo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #10)

Fast turnaround, thank you! Please mind updating UPDATING and maybe even pkg-message to make users aware.

There is room for one future improvement: neo4j open source edition supports only one DB in one instance, commercial one supports multiple. If someone needs multiple DBs on one host this is impossible. Maybe profile suppor like done in PostgreSQL and others would be helpful. Just keep that in mind, no need to implement.
